prompt: A minimalist, high-end editorial photograph. An empty, darkened auditorium contains exactly eight school desks arranged in a precise 2-by-4 rectangular grid. Seven desks are made of solid, polished dark wood. The eighth desk in the bottom corner is made of melting, translucent ice, with small puddles of water beneath it. Cold, cinematic overhead spotlighting. Sharp focus, symmetrical composition, 8k resolution. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LOGOS, NO BRAND NAMES, NO WORDS. Shot on 35mm film.
dataset_name: CDC Youth Risk Behavior Survey (YRBS) Data Summary & Trends Report: 2013–2023
insight: Using a precise 2x4 grid of 8 desks, the single melting ice desk represents the 13% of students (approx. 1-in-8) who feel too unsafe to attend school.
